headline: Increase Expands Instant Payment Solutions to Include Push-to-Card Transfers
summary: NEW YORK, May 26, 2026--Increase, a modern banking core purpose-built to help technology companies store, move, and reconcile money, has expanded instant payments to include push-to-card transfers. This latest addition to the Increase platform enables companies to issue payouts, disbursements, and refunds directly to eligible Mastercard or Visa cards. The company also announced that Warren Brown has joined Increase as the General Manager of its card issuing solutions.

headline: The fundamentals in the equity markets are still strong, says Neuberger’s Holly Newman Kroft
summary: Holly Newman Kroft, managing director at Neuberger Berman Private Wealth, joins CNBC’s ‘Squawk on the Street’ to discuss what’s dominating conversations with her clients, her advice to investors, and more.

headline: Mastercard CEO Michael Miebach: Overall spending trends in the Middle East remain solid
summary: Mastercard CEO Michael Miebach joins 'Squawk on the Street' to discuss the 20th anniversary of its IPO, the trends he is seeing in consumer spending, whether the Iran war has impacted its business, and more.
